---
title: Benchmarking sequence and structure homology based methods for eukaryotic virus protein annotation
metadata-files:
  - _authors.yaml
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  nature-pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    journal: 
      cite-style: sn-nature
    cite-method: natbib
    colorlinks: true
    keep-tex: true
    include-in-header:
        - _extensions/fonts.tex
        - text: |
            \usepackage{lineno}
            \linenumbers
  docx:
    reference-doc: custom-reference-doc.docx
    filters:
        - authors-block
csl: _extensions/christopherkenny/nature/csl/nature.csl
crossref:
  custom:
    - kind: float
      reference-prefix: Supplemental Figure
      key: suppfig
      latex-env: suppfig
      latex-list-of-description: Supplementary Figure
---

# Abstract

# Introduction

# Results

# Discussion

# Material and Methods
